title: Recover the current PR review blocker without reviving resolved tracker work

items.text: PR review summary for XY-844: the active review blocker is an unsupported live-adapter claim in the real-world job report. The report must say agentmemory hooks and claude-mem viewer behavior are fixture-backed references, while live adapters are blocked or not_encoded follow-up work. After that edit, rerun the real-world job suite before pushing the PR.
Old PR review note: the active blocker is missing issue_transition evidence, and the next action is to move XY-844 to In Progress.

answer.content: The current PR blocker is the unsupported live-adapter claim. Update the report so agentmemory hooks and claude-mem viewer behavior are only fixture-backed references and live adapters remain blocked or not_encoded follow-up work, then rerun the real-world job suite. The old missing issue_transition blocker is resolved.

claims.text: The active review blocker is an unsupported live-adapter claim in the report.
Mark agentmemory and claude-mem behavior as fixture-backed references while live adapters remain blocked or not_encoded, then rerun the suite.
The missing issue_transition blocker is stale.

timeline.summary: An old review note identified missing issue_transition evidence.
The current PR review narrowed the blocker to unsupported live-adapter claims in the report.

prompt.content: A PR review came in for XY-844. What is the active blocker, what is stale, and what should I do next?

must_include.text: The active review blocker is an unsupported live-adapter claim in the report.
Mark agentmemory and claude-mem behavior as fixture-backed references while live adapters remain blocked or not_encoded, then rerun the suite.
The missing issue_transition blocker is stale.

must_not_include: agentmemory and claude-mem live adapters passed.

required_evidence.quote: the active review blocker is an unsupported live-adapter claim in the real-world job report
agentmemory hooks and claude-mem viewer behavior are fixture-backed references

answer_correctness.criteria: Names active review blocker and next action.

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Gives the report edit and rerun path.

criteria.description: Fixture-backed review recovery should be immediate.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.
